note: Tier-K motion graphics rendered as code (Remotion + FFmpeg). These are exact, data-driven and animatable — NOT generated images. Palette dark/gold; the return LINE uses the single cold accent. NO pink. Citations burn in for major claims, linked to claim_id.
reusable_components: ReturnLine: the hero curve (data-driven, smooth, always-rising), with optional annotation overlay and a 'jagged real-market' comparison line
PonziLoop: closed circle of new->old hands passing coins; can speed up then seize
NumberMorph: large gold figure that morphs/shrinks (e.g. $65,000,000,000 -> $17,500,000,000)
Timeline: horizontal date ribbon with pins, used for the whistleblower-warning years and the 1999->2008->2009->2021 arc
CitationLowerThird: small-caps source label tied to claim_id, burned in
OpenCaption: burned-in styled subtitles, bottom third
ChapterCard / QuoteCard: minimal gold-on-black title and pull-quote cards

key_graphics.spec: The Line draws on from left to right, climbing smoothly, never dipping; hold. This is the cold-open image.
Same line continues through good and bad market shading in the background; it stays smooth while the background turns stormy.
Coins pass new-hand -> old-hand around a closed ring labeled (caption) 'paid with the next investor's money'; ring spins faster, then locks when inflow stops.
$65B (label: 'on the statements') shrinks/peels away fictional profit to ~$17.5B (label: 'real cash lost'). The gap is highlighted.
The Line gets hand-annotated: circles on the impossibly smooth stretches, a scrawled 'impossible'.
Warning years pin in one by one (2000, 2001, 2005, 2007, 2008) toward an unmoving SEC marker. NOTE: lock exact years to SEC OIG before render.
'SEC Office of Inspector General report, 2009' on the failure beat.
'150 YEARS' card, gold on black, after a held silence beat.
Arc: Dec 2008 arrest -> Mar 2009 plea (11 felonies) -> Jun 2009 sentence -> 2021 death.
Recovery: a bar rising to '>90% of real losses recovered' with caveat caption 'not everyone; some institutions closed'.
Final reveal: the smooth Line beside a jagged real line; caption 'too smooth = warning'. The smooth one is marked as the red flag.

global.captions: open captions burned in for the whole film, force-aligned to the narration master
global.citation_policy: burn a source lower-third for every on-screen factual number, linked to claim_id
global.disclaimer: cold-open + persistent-in-description: 'Dramatized symbolic reconstruction. Not financial or legal advice.'
